DescribeLLMDimensionValues.key: Attribute name, options: service (application name), host (instance name), duration (response time in us), traceId (TraceID), attributes.apm.operation (API), attributes.apm.component (request type), attributes.gen_ai.kind (span type), attributes.gen_ai.response.model (model name)
DescribeLLMDimensionValues.filters: Filter list, only supports service (application name) filtering
DescribeLLMDimensionValues.filters.op: Filter operator, options: `=` - equals, `:` - equals, `!=` - not equals, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal
DescribeLLMDimensionValues.filters.value: Single value, usable with operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeLLMDimensionValues.filters.values: Multiple values, usable with operator: in
